assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent returns mentor for a clear conversational message
assertionResults.title: returns mentor for a clear conversational message

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent returns uncertain for short or ambiguous text
assertionResults.title: returns uncertain for short or ambiguous text

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent is synchronous and does not call network APIs
assertionResults.title: is synchronous and does not call network APIs

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path resolves "resume my maths session" to subject.hub when maths is unique in index
assertionResults.title: resolves "resume my maths session" to subject.hub when maths is unique in index

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path resolves "open french today" via NL (no literal subject-id keyword present)
assertionResults.title: resolves "open french today" via NL (no literal subject-id keyword present)

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path resolves "continue french learning" to subject.hub
assertionResults.title: resolves "continue french learning" to subject.hub

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path returns uncertain when subject name is absent from the index
assertionResults.title: returns uncertain when subject name is absent from the index

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path returns uncertain when nameIndex is provided but empty subjects
assertionResults.title: returns uncertain when nameIndex is provided but empty subjects

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path returns uncertain when multiple subjects match the query
assertionResults.title: returns uncertain when multiple subjects match the query

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path returns uncertain when a subject name appears in the query but is ambiguous (same name, two IDs)
assertionResults.title: returns uncertain when a subject name appears in the query but is ambiguous (same name, two IDs)

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path resolves subject + topic to retention.review when "review" verb present
assertionResults.title: resolves subject + topic to retention.review when "review" verb present

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path resolves subject + topic to challenge.start when "challenge" verb present
assertionResults.title: resolves subject + topic to challenge.start when "challenge" verb present

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path does not pair a topic with a subject it does not belong to [topic-ownership-guard]
assertionResults.title: does not pair a topic with a subject it does not belong to [topic-ownership-guard]

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path returns uncertain without nameIndex when no literal ID follows keyword
assertionResults.title: returns uncertain without nameIndex when no literal ID follows keyword

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path every NL jump expands through pushNowDeepLink without throwing
assertionResults.title: every NL jump expands through pushNowDeepLink without throwing

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path returns mentor for a question-shaped input even when a subject name appears in it [NL-question-guard]
assertionResults.title: returns mentor for a question-shaped input even when a subject name appears in it [NL-question-guard]

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path does not throw when a subject entry has an undefined name [NL-undefined-name-guard]
assertionResults.title: does not throw when a subject entry has an undefined name [NL-undefined-name-guard]

assertionResults.fullName: matchBarIntent — NL name-index path NL path is fully synchronous (no Promise, no network)
assertionResults.title: NL path is fully synchronous (no Promise, no network)

● matchBarIntent › routes an explicit pedagogical show-me-how request to Mentor with exact input

    + Received  + 1

      Object {
    -   "kind": "mentor",
    +   "kind": "uncertain",
        "text": "show me how photosynthesis works",
      }

      26 |
      27 |   it('routes an explicit pedagogical show-me-how request to Mentor with exact input', () => {
    > 28 |     expect(matchBarIntent('show me how photosynthesis works')).toEqual({
         |                                                                ^

      30 |       text: 'show me how photosynthesis works',
      31 |     });
